content:
Goal
* Please change "that shows" to "that show" (the verb refers to "images", right?).

* Consider changing "of the fully constructed die that shows the geometric orientations of some of the faces" to "that show some of the faces of the fully constructed die".

Input
* Line 1: Consider simplifying as:
{{6}} face labels used on the die, in no particular order

Output
* Consider simplifying the first point:
Two die templates are <<equal>> if their folded dice can be rotated to match.

Constraints
* Please add constraints for [[W]] and [[H]].

Cases
* You are probably aware that [[W]] is incorrect in more than half of the cases.

* Some cases include face labels used as edge characters in the 3D images (/, \, |, +, -, v). These require special attention. Currently:
  • /: Validators 7, 9, 17
  • \: Validator 8, Test 18
  • |: Test 19, Validator 20
  • +: Test 21
  • -: Validator 14, Test 24
  • v: Validator 3, Test 19, Validator 23
  "/" doesn't appear in tests and "+" doesn't appear in validators. The cases should be adjusted to ensure proper coverage.

Thanks.
WIP, there may be incorrect test cases.
